name: livetennisapi-mcp
description: Real-time tennis scores, players, fixtures and model win-probability for ATP, WTA, Challenger and ITF.
long_description:
Read-only access to professional tennis: live and upcoming matches with point-by-point scores, players and rankings, the forward fixture schedule, match-winner market prices and a model-driven win-probability. Covers ATP, WTA, Challenger and ITF, singles and doubles.

The server is tier-aware. An endpoint above your plan returns a plain-English explanation naming the tier required, as a normal result rather than a bare 403, so the model can tell you something true instead of guessing or retrying.

A free tier needs no card and covers live/upcoming matches, scores, players and fixtures at 1,000 requests/day: https://livetennisapi.com/subscribe/free

api_key.title: API key
api_key.description: Your Live Tennis API key (twjp_...). Get one free, no card, at https://livetennisapi.com/subscribe/free. Optional — without it the server still starts and lists its tools, but only check_api_status returns data.
